techniques.name: Face Feature Authentication
techniques.description: Biometric authentication technique that utilizes a novel approach to extracting features from human faces for improved authentication performance.
sources: @inproceedings{srisukFaceAuthenticationUsing2003,  title = {Face Authentication Using the Trace Transform},  booktitle = {2003 {{IEEE Computer Society Conference}} on {{Computer Vision}} and {{Pattern Recognition}}, 2003. {{Proceedings}}.},  author = {Srisuk, S. and Petrou, M. and Kurutach, W. and Kadyrov, A.},  year = {2003},  month = jun,  volume = {1},  pages = {I-I},  issn = {1063-6919},  doi = {10.1109/CVPR.2003.1211368}}
